image.description: The image to edit (PNG, less than 4MB, square)

mask.description: Additional image whose transparent areas indicate where to edit

prompt.description: A text description of the desired edits

model.description: The model to use for image editing

n.description: The number of images to generate

size.description: The size of the generated images

response_format.description: The format in which the generated images are returned

user.description: A unique identifier representing your end-user
